features.name: $finish in virtual function with subsequent call
features.description: Code should include a virtual function that contains a $finish statement, called from another location with code following the call that should not execute

features.name: $finish in virtual function with queue-based conditional
features.description: Code should include a virtual function with $finish triggered by a queue size check, called from a method that then continues executing additional code

features.name: virtual function call chain with $finish and subsequent method invocation
features.description: Code should include a sequence where a virtual function containing $finish is called, followed by a call to another virtual function that should not execute
